description.en: DENDRAL was one of the first expert systems to show that domain knowledge could make AI practically useful. It helped infer molecular structures from mass-spectrometry evidence by combining search with expert chemical rules. The project shifted attention from general reasoning alone to knowledge-rich systems.
description.zh: DENDRAL 是最早展示领域知识能让 AI 具有实际用途的专家系统之一。它把搜索与专家化学规则结合起来，根据质谱证据推断分子结构。这个项目把注意力从单纯通用推理转向富知识系统。

html.en: General-purpose problem solving was not enough for hard scientific tasks. DENDRAL showed that carefully encoded expertise could focus search.
html.zh: 通用问题求解不足以处理困难科学任务。DENDRAL 表明，精心编码的专业知识可以聚焦搜索。

html.en: The system generated candidate molecular structures and rejected impossible ones using chemical constraints.
html.zh: 系统生成候选分子结构，并用化学约束排除不可能的候选。

html.en: Experts generally treat DENDRAL as one of the first convincing demonstrations that domain knowledge could make AI useful. Its long-term legacy is the expert-system and knowledge-engineering tradition in chemistry, medicine, and enterprise decision support.
html.zh: 专家通常把 DENDRAL 视为最早有力证明领域知识能让 AI 变得有用的系统之一。它的长期影响在于推动了化学、医学和企业决策支持中的专家系统与知识工程传统。

method.zh: 规则引导的化学结构推断

material.en: Chemical inference papers and Turing Award histories
material.zh: 化学推断论文与图灵奖史料

demo.en: Use expert rules to narrow molecular structures
demo.zh: 用专家规则缩小分子结构候选

text.en: Experts help encode rules that guide the system.
text.zh: 专家帮助编码规则以引导系统。

text.en: Candidate structures are generated, then filtered by constraints.
text.zh: 先生成候选结构，再用约束筛选。

text.en: Chemical evidence supplies clues about molecular fragments.
text.zh: 化学证据提供关于分子片段的线索。

description.zh: 早期 DENDRAL 化学推断工作的原始文献记录。
